# Randall Brezina

> Randall Brezina is a Computer Information Technology (CIT) graduate from Lethbridge
> Polytechnic (formerly Lethbridge College), focused on computer hardware, custom PC
> builds, UI/UX design, and web development. Based in Lethbridge, Alberta, Canada.

## About

Randall Brezina is a Computer Information Technology (CIT) graduate from Lethbridge
Polytechnic (formerly Lethbridge College) with a passion for UI design, analyzing
systems, and problem-solving. He enjoys building efficient, scalable solutions and
exploring technologies like React, Node.js, and cloud computing, and specializes in
hands-on hardware work and custom PC building.

## Education

- Computer Information Technology (CIT), Lethbridge Polytechnic (formerly Lethbridge College)

## Skills

- Hands-on hardware & PC building
- Hardware troubleshooting
- Client communication & consulting
- Budget planning
- Networking basics
- UI/UX design
- React
- React Native & Expo
- Mobile app development (Android)
- Node.js
- C#
- HTML

## Projects

- **ShelfCast: Sales Analytics & Forecasting Dashboard**: A sales dashboard that
  provides analytics and insights, including predicting future sales with a
  forecasting algorithm. Originally built for a local business in Lethbridge and
  expanded to be scalable for any small business with POS data.
- **ShiftClocker: Shift Logging App**: A fully featured shift-logging app built from
  scratch with React Native and Expo (SDK 54) during a practicum and headed for the
  Google Play Store. Tracks per-job pay rates, raises, overtime, breaks, tips, and
  mileage; logs by live timer, quick templates, or manual entry; exports CSV and PDF
  reports with custom date ranges; and ships with ten live-switchable themes.
- **Brezina Strength Academy**: A personal coaching website built with Wix and Figma,
  focused on UI/UX design, accessibility, and mobile usability, applying Steve Krug's
  usability principles.
- **Client's High-Performance Gaming Build**: An end-to-end custom gaming PC built for
  a client on a $2,500 CAD budget (delivered ~$2,200), including parts selection,
  budget and performance consulting, assembly, Windows setup, and tuning.
- **Client's Gaming/Media Production Build**: A custom PC for gaming, video editing,
  and social media creation, with full client guidance and a 1440p performance target.
- **Personal Gaming + Productivity Build**: A custom PC for gaming, content creation,
  and IT development work.
- **Custom Mechanical Keyboard Build**: A hand-assembled mechanical keyboard focused on
  typing feel, reliability, and ergonomic comfort.
